calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-22-2016 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-23-2016 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Dec-06-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Sep-21-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, John F. Henning III of the Law Offices of Brian L. Larsen (415-398-5000) appears as counsel for plaintiff/opposing party

Deputy City Attorney, Frederick P. Sheinfield of the San Francisco City Attorney's Office (415-554-3872) appears as counsel for defendant/moving party

The cause is argued and submitted by both sides as set forth in the transcript of the certified shorthand reporter. The Court confirms the tentative ruling with modification.

DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is DENIED. The City's motion is dependent on the purported undisputed fact set forth in its Fact 2 that the City "repaired the depression." The factual support for Fact 2 does not show that the repair was done adequately or completed, but merely that certain unspecified work was "completed." Moreover, plaintiff's objection to the paragraph 6 of the Keanway declaration and exhibit A thereto on grounds of lack of foundation is sustained. Thus, the City fails to satisfy its burden of production. Objections to the Kyi Declaration are sustained. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Sherry L. Sawyer, CSR #5976, email: ssawyer@sftc.org. (D302)
